digest.component_or_area: audit per-ticket page (rebar audit server + Jinja2 templates)
propositions: A read-only single-column finding-centric page at /ticket/<id> renders verdict-first with findings second and provenance on demand, using native <details>/<summary> for JS-free keyboard/screen-reader support.

A sticky gate-status strip shows all three gate verdicts (plan, completion, code) with magnitude counts simultaneously, each chip an in-page anchor to its detail section rendered in fixed canonical order.

Each finding row expands in place to a four-pass narrative (Finding, Verification, Decision, Coaching), with findings grouped by decision — Blocking expanded, Advisory/Dropped/Indeterminate collapsed-and-counted, sorted by priority.

A per-finding neutral threshold meter fills a 0–1 bar to priority with a tick at the finding's own persisted resolved block_threshold, the fill color inheriting the decision color, read straight from the sidecar rather than a runtime criteria_routing lookup.

The convergence visualization emits stacked conv-bars for ≤3 rounds and an svg conv-line with one polyline per decision series for ≥4 rounds (mutually exclusive), each accompanied by a visually-hidden data table for accessibility.

The completion panel is criterion-centric single-pass, rendering one chevron-less row per story C criteria[] entry (met glyph, kind badge, citation) and flagging operator-attested criteria lacking an attestation.
